description_long: This object is a large, dark-colored blade with a dramatic, jagged profile and a pointed tip, resembling a fantasy or ornamental sword. The blade features several pronounced, angular protrusions along its spine, giving it an aggressive, almost flame-like silhouette. The surface appears to be matte or semi-matte, with a consistent dark gray to black coloration and subtle textural variations. There are no visible markings, engravings, or decorative elements, and the handle is not distinctly separated from the blade, suggesting a full-tang or monolithic construction. The object is relatively thin in profile, as seen from the edge views, and lacks a crossguard or pommel. Its overall design is utilitarian yet stylized, making it suitable for display or as a prop in an urban or fantasy-themed environment.
description: A large, jagged, dark blade with angular protrusions and a pointed tip, lacking a distinct handle or guard. The surface is matte and uniformly dark, with a dramatic, aggressive silhouette.
description_view_0: The blade is seen in full profile, showcasing its jagged, angular spine and pointed tip, with the entire silhouette visible.
description_view_1: The object is viewed edge-on, appearing as a thin, straight line, emphasizing its slim profile and sharpness.
description_view_2: The opposite profile view reveals the same jagged blade shape and pointed tip, mirroring the features seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view, similar to view 1, showing the thinness of the blade from a different side.
attribute_blade_type: single-edged, jagged, fantasy-style blade with angular protrusions
attribute_handle_design: integral handle, no distinct grip, same material and finish as blade
